# Deepspace Veil
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Deepspace%20Veil&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Deepspace Veil
| desc = A cloak weaved from an unknown material, said to drape it's user in absolute, utter, nothingness.
| slot = cloak
| tier = GL

| cost = 90
| cooldown = 7
| fameb = 6
| soulbound = yes

| bonuses = {{Stat|spd|5}} {{Stat|dex|4}} {{Stat|vit|3}} {{Stat|wis|3}}

| effects = yes
| invisible = 6

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by: [[Cracked Core]], [[The Zucc]] and [[L. Bandito]].
}}

<noinclude>
{{NavCloaks}}
[[Category:Cloaks]]
</noinclude>
